steps.prompt: Yum! Let's write the names of some fruits. Find apple and trace it!
steps.feedback: Apple! Five letters — starts with a.
Pear! Four letters — shaped like a teardrop.
Kiwi! Four letters — green and tangy inside.
Mango! Five letters — sweet and orange inside. Last one — find lemon!
Lemon! Five letters — very sour! You wrote them all!
